description: Founded in Abidjan, Côte d'Ivoire by Sydney Abouna with a bold vision to revolutionize African agriculture through precision farming
Successfully delivered our first large-scale greenhouse installation, setting the standard for modern agriculture in Côte d'Ivoire
Formed key partnerships with AZUD, Hortalan, World Bank, GIZ and the Ministry of Agriculture, establishing Arbre Bio as a trusted leader
Expanded operations across 5 African countries including Côte d'Ivoire, Ghana, Burkina Faso, Zimbabwe and Kenya, completing 500+ projects
Launched smart farming solutions integrating IoT monitoring, AI-powered analytics and remote farm management systems
Establishing a landmark joint venture with Hortalan to open their first branch in Côte d'Ivoire — a major milestone for West African agriculture
